Camera.Dual:: 50 MP, f/1.8, (wide), 1/1.56", 1.0µm, multi-directional PDAF, OIS 13 MP, f/2.2, 120˚ (ultrawide), 1/3.0", 1.12µm, PDAF

Design.Others:: IP68/IP69 dust tight and water resistant (high pressure water jets; immersible up to 1.5m for 30 min) Drop resistant up to 1.2m MIL-STD-810H compliant* * does not guarantee ruggedness or use in extreme conditions

Hardware.OS:: Android 16, up to 3 major Android upgrades
Hardware.Chipset:: Qualcomm SM7635 Snapdragon 7s Gen 3 (4 nm) - International Qualcomm SM7635-AC Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 (4 nm) - India
Hardware.CPU:: Octa-core (1x2.5 GHz Cortex-A720 & 3x2.4 GHz Cortex-A720 & 4x1.8 GHz Cortex-A520) - International Octa-core (1x2.7 GHz Cortex-A720 & 3x2.4 GHz Cortex-A720 & 4x1.8 GHz Cortex-A520) - India

Multimedia.Loudspeaker:: Yes, with stereo speakers (with Dolby Atmos)

Connectivity & Features.Sensors:: Fingerprint (under display, optical), accelerometer, gyro, proximity, compass Smart Connect (Ready For) support
